label: ci-flakiness-cleanup
topWin: Diagnosed and killed the hidden sw-version vs build-shell-assets race that had been quietly dropping E2E compliance to red since S77 — root-cause fix, not a symptom patch.
topGap: Lighthouse + E2E runs were still in_progress at closeout; the playwright-axe lockfile fix was committed after the main CI-fix commit and is technically unverified until next push.
ignisNote: Best session pattern: one CI failure led to diagnosing two latent failures (lockfile, sw-version race) that had been red-for-months noise. Digging past the symptom paid off.
